title: nephrodium orientale
intro: Nephrodium orientale, also known as the oriental maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its potential health benefits in lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Nephrodium orientale include infusions and decoctions, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
